text: This is a desktop web app of the board game of the same name.

Fun fact actually, 2 days before I started working on this project, I had played the offline version of the game with my friends. Then the next day I told them I wanted to play it with them again online but there was no good online version.
So I said well what if I make it myself? And they all encouraged me.
Then I started working on the game, to prove to them that I couldn't do it. That I didn't have it in me.
